name: fetch

method.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, etc.)

save_as.description: Download response body to this file path (relative or absolute). When set, returns file path and size instead of inline body.

form.description: Multipart/form-data form fields as key-value pairs. When set, body and Content-Type are ignored; method is forced to POST.

form_files.description: Files to include in multipart/form-data upload. Each item: {"field": "field_name", "path": "/path/to/file"}. Requires form parameter to be set; method forced to POST.

cookies.description: Cookie key-value pairs to include in the request (e.g. {"session": "abc123"})

follow_redirect.description: Whether to follow HTTP redirects (default: true)

encoding.description: Response body encoding for non-UTF-8 responses. Supported: utf-8, gbk, big5, shift_jis, euc-jp, euc-kr, iso-8859-1 (default: utf-8)
